prestazioni: 1GD-FTV 2.8L turbo-diesel engine: Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger upgrade with billet compressor wheel (60mm inducer, 82mm exducer) and 0.82 A/R turbine housing, supporting 350hp and 750Nm torque with a custom ECU flash via Haltech Elite 2500 standalone (mapped for 22psi peak boost on 98RON fuel)

Full 4.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Tomei with 3.5-inch downpipe featuring a 200-cell catalytic converter and dual 4-inch titanium-coated mufflers (MagnaFlow 14815), paired with a custom intercooler upgrade (GReddy Type-25, 600x300x76mm core) and silicone charge pipes (Samco Sport, 3.5-inch ID)

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 24-way rebound, 12-way compression) with custom valving for the Hilux Revo Rocco chassis, paired with SuperPro polyurethane bushings (full kit: 9045K) and a Whiteline 27mm rear sway bar (BTR27Z) for reduced body roll
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Hilux Revo Rocco-specific, carbon fiber fenders with 50mm extended flares, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) finished in custom matte 'Rocco Gray' (Toyota 1G3) with gloss black accents

Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2-piece forged wheels (18x9 +30 front, 18x10.5 +35 rear) in matte bronze, wrapped in Toyo Open Country R/T Trail 285/65R18 tires (33-inch diameter) with custom fender rolling (30mm clearance front, 40mm rear)

Custom LED lighting setup: Osram Night Breaker Laser H7 headlights (6500K), Philips Ultinon Pro9000 fog lights (5000K), and a full underglow kit by Diode Dynamics (Cobalt Blue, 1200 lumens per side) with wireless control via Bluetooth (iOS/Android app)
